NWS SURVEY DETERMINES EF1 TORNADO WITH DAMAGE PATH FROM 30.98 -85.41 AT 952 AM CDT TO 31.33 -84.90 2MI SE OF BLAKELY GEORGIA AT 1138 AM EDT. THIS TORNADO BEGAN ABOUT A MILE SOUTH OF THE AL-FL STATE LINE AND TRACKED THROUGH SOUTHERN HOUSTON COUNTY. NUMEROUS TREES WERE SNAPPED OR UPROOTED ALONG THE PATH WITH SOME DAMAGE TO STRUCTURES NOTED AS WELL...PRIMARILY WITH ROOF MATERIAL REMOVED. TOTAL TRACK LENGTH OF 39.1 MILES WITH ESTIMATED MAX WINDS AROUND 105 MPH.

NWS SURVEY DETERMINES EF1 TORNADO WITH DAMAGE PATH FROM 30.98 -85.41 AT 952 AM CDT TO 31.16 -85.16 NEAR PANSEY ALABAMA AT 1010 AM CDT. THIS TORNADO BEGAN ABOUT A MILE SOUTH OF THE AL-FL STATE LINE AND TRACKED THROUGH SOUTHERN HOUSTON COUNTY. NUMEROUS TREES WERE SNAPPED OR UPROOTED...EXCEPT WHERE A LARGE TREE BADLY DAMAGED A HOME IN COTTONWOOD BY FALLING ON IT. 19 MILE LONG TRACK WITH ESTIMATED MAX WINDS AROUND 105 MPH.
TREES DOWN NEAR HIGHWAY 231 SOUTH NEAR THE STATE LINE.
